mapper.sql:
SELECT iqde.fid, iqde.fbillno, iqde.fdocumentstatus, su.user_name as fcreatorid, iqde.fcreatedate, sue.user_name as fshr, iqde.fdate_sh, iqde.fdate, cy.name_zh as f_ckgj, bld.name as f_khly,
iqde.f_gdhl, bd. name as f_bjbb, iqde.f_mll, bc.fnumber as f_khbm, iqde.f_cty_baseproperty, iqde.f_cty_baseproperty1, se.fname as f_xsy1, iqde.f_ywy, iqde.fkhxq, iqde.f_qyd, iqde.f_fkfs, iqde.f_cty_baseproperty4, iqde.f_btjshj, iqde.f_jshjbwb, iqde.f_btcbhj, iqde.f_email, iqde.f_mob, iqde.f_tel, iqde.f_fax, iqde.fmjlr, iqde.f_cgbjrq, iqde.f_bzf, iqde.f_hdf, iqde.f_lyf, iqde.f_qtfy, iqde.f_fyxj, iqde.f_hqbjfk FROM inquiry_order iqde LEFT JOIN sys_user su on iqde.fcreatorid=su.k3_key LEFT JOIN sys_user sue on iqde.fshr=sue.k3_key LEFT JOIN sys_employee se on iqde.f_xsy1=se.salesman_id LEFT JOIN bd_customer bc on iqde.f_khbm=bc.fcustid LEFT JOIN country cy on iqde.f_ckgj=cy.id LEFT JOIN bymaterial_dictionary bld on iqde.f_khly=bld.kingdee and bld.category='customer_source' LEFT JOIN bymaterial_dictionary bd on iqde.f_bjbb=bd.kingdee and bd.category='currency'
mapper.select:
SELECT iqde.fid, iqde.fbillno, iqde.fdocumentstatus, su.user_name as fcreatorid, iqde.fcreatedate, sue.user_name as fshr, iqde.fdate_sh, iqde.fdate, cy.name_zh as f_ckgj, bld.name as f_khly,
iqde.f_gdhl, bd. name as f_bjbb, iqde.f_mll, bc.fnumber as f_khbm, iqde.f_cty_baseproperty, iqde.f_cty_baseproperty1, se.fname as f_xsy1, iqde.f_ywy, iqde.fkhxq, iqde.f_qyd, iqde.f_fkfs, iqde.f_cty_baseproperty4, iqde.f_btjshj, iqde.f_jshjbwb, iqde.f_btcbhj, iqde.f_email, iqde.f_mob, iqde.f_tel, iqde.f_fax, iqde.fmjlr, iqde.f_cgbjrq, iqde.f_bzf, iqde.f_hdf, iqde.f_lyf, iqde.f_qtfy, iqde.f_fyxj, iqde.f_hqbjfk FROM inquiry_order iqde LEFT JOIN sys_user su on iqde.fcreatorid=su.k3_key LEFT JOIN sys_user sue on iqde.fshr=sue.k3_key LEFT JOIN sys_employee se on iqde.f_xsy1=se.salesman_id LEFT JOIN bd_customer bc on iqde.f_khbm=bc.fcustid LEFT JOIN country cy on iqde.f_ckgj=cy.id LEFT JOIN bymaterial_dictionary bld on iqde.f_khly=bld.kingdee and bld.category='customer_source' LEFT JOIN bymaterial_dictionary bd on iqde.f_bjbb=bd.kingdee and bd.category='currency' where iqde.fid = #{fid}

select fid, fbillno, fdocumentstatus, fcreatorid, fcreatedate, fshr, fdate_sh, fdate, f_ckgj, f_khly, f_gdhl, f_bjbb, f_mll, f_khbm, f_cty_baseproperty, f_cty_baseproperty1, f_xsy1, f_ywy, fkhxq, f_qyd, f_fkfs, f_cty_baseproperty4, f_btjshj, f_jshjbwb, f_btcbhj, f_email, f_mob, f_tel, f_fax, fmjlr, f_cgbjrq, f_bzf, f_hdf, f_lyf, f_qtfy, f_fyxj, f_hqbjfk from inquiry_order where fbillno = #{billNo} and fid != #{excludeFid}

SELECT iqde.fid, iqde.fbillno, iqde.fdocumentstatus, su.user_name as fcreatorid, iqde.fcreatedate, sue.user_name as fshr, iqde.fdate_sh, iqde.fdate, cy.name_zh as f_ckgj, bld.name as f_khly, iqde.f_gdhl, bd. name as f_bjbb, iqde.f_mll, bc.fnumber as f_khbm, iqde.f_cty_baseproperty, iqde.f_cty_baseproperty1, se.fname as f_xsy1, iqde.f_ywy, iqde.fkhxq, iqde.f_qyd, iqde.f_fkfs, iqde.f_cty_baseproperty4, iqde.f_btjshj, iqde.f_jshjbwb, iqde.f_btcbhj, iqde.f_email, iqde.f_mob, iqde.f_tel, iqde.f_fax, iqde.fmjlr, iqde.f_cgbjrq, iqde.f_bzf, iqde.f_hdf, iqde.f_lyf, iqde.f_qtfy, iqde.f_fyxj, iqde.f_hqbjfk FROM inquiry_order iqde LEFT JOIN sys_user su on iqde.fcreatorid=su.k3_key LEFT JOIN sys_user sue on iqde.fshr=sue.k3_key LEFT JOIN sys_employee se on iqde.f_xsy1=se.salesman_id LEFT JOIN bd_customer bc on iqde.f_khbm=bc.fcustid LEFT JOIN country cy on iqde.f_ckgj=cy.id LEFT JOIN bymaterial_dictionary bld on iqde.f_khly=bld.kingdee and bld.category='customer_source' LEFT JOIN bymaterial_dictionary bd on iqde.f_bjbb=bd.kingdee and bd.category='currency' WHERE iqde.id = #{id}
